latin: Frodo sciebat se Comitatum relinquere debere ut anulum ad Montem Fati ferret. Samvisa Gamgius, servus fidelis Frodonis, sub fenestra auscultatans deprehensus est. Gandalf iussit Samvisam comitem Frodonis fieri. ita Frodo et Sam nocte Comitatum reliquerunt et in viam longam et periculosam ingressi sunt. Frodo tristis erat quod patriam dulcem relinquebat, sed animus eius firmus manebat.

glossary.ingressi sunt: they entered upon, set out on

questions.prompt: Why did Frodo have to leave the Shire?
questions.target: To carry the Ring to Mount Doom
choices: To carry the Ring to Mount Doom

questions.target: He was caught eavesdropping under the window
choices: He was caught eavesdropping under the window

questions.prompt: When did Frodo and Sam leave?
How did Frodo feel about leaving?

translation: Frodo knew that he had to leave the Shire in order to carry the ring to Mount Doom. Samwise Gamgee, Frodo's faithful servant, was caught eavesdropping under the window. Gandalf ordered Sam to become Frodo's companion. And so Frodo and Sam left the Shire by night and set out on a long and dangerous road. Frodo was sad because he was leaving his sweet homeland, but his spirit remained steadfast.
